Registry / Terms / disturbance

disturbance

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00376 · 56 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 41 distinct definitions — harmonise.
